## Checklist

- [ ] Scoped to one thing — small, focused PRs get reviewed fastest
- [ ] Tests / examples updated (or N/A with a reason)
- [ ] `README` / docs updated if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] CI is green (build, tests, type-check)
- [ ] I signed the CLA on my first PR (the bot comments a one-click link)
